title: Suki Baby Zooma Soft Boa Plush Baby's Blankie with Embroidered Accents (Zebra)
features: Suki Baby Zooma Zebra plush babys Blankie
Soft boa plush Blankie with embroidered accents
Zebra print in soft grey and white
description: Product Description Beautiful supersoft plush Zooma Zebra Babys Blankie / comforter from Suki Gifts Baby collection. Premium quality animal style print soft boa plush Zebra in two colour soft grey and white, with embroidered accents to the face. Approximately 17 ¼ inches (43.8cm) long. Suitable for Newborns+. Other items also available in the Bing Bing Giraffe and Zooma Zebra range. Hand wash and air dry. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Box Contains 1 x Suki Baby Zooma Zebra soft boa plush babys Blankie
